signal.title: OpenAI investor says AI requires an income tax overhaul
signal.reason: Highlights a critical policy discussion from an influential AI investor, signaling potential future economic and regulatory changes (e.g., funding availability, tax implications for startups and investors) that could profoundly impact the operational landscape for AI companies and investments.

signal.title: Why recruiters are making interviews ‘AI-free zones’
signal.reason: This headline provides a significant signal about the real-world impact and challenges of AI model proliferation, specifically concerning talent assessment and the need for genuine human skills. It highlights a critical business reaction to AI tools, impacting HR tech startups, the perceived value of AI-assisted work, and broader economic productivity. This is highly relevant for understanding market dynamics and the societal integration challenges of AI.

tldr: AI's economic disruption prompts tax reform talk and interview bans.
